zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Dafydd ap Mathew於1400年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根利安達福時，他的父親Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew32歲，母親Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming35歲。他和Gwenllian verch Dafydd至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1484年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根亞斯享年84歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根布利頓 費里聖 馬也斯。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Mathew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Mathai, Babu, Oommen, Saji, Varughese, Raju, Reji, Sunil, Prakash, Prasad, Shaji, Cheriyan.
English and Scottish: variant of Matthew . Mathew is common as a personal name among Christians in South India, and was registered as a surname after their immigration to the US.

variants.name: Mathews
meanings: English: patronymic from   Mathew  ; a variant of   Matthews  . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages.

History: Among the earliest bearers of the name in North America was Samuel Mathews (c. 1600–c. 1657), who came to VA from London c. 1618. He established a plantation at the mouth of the Warwick River, which was at first called Mathews Manor; later its name was changed to Denbigh. He was one of the most powerful and influential men in the early affairs of the colony. He (or possibly his son, who bore the same name) was governor of the colony from 1657 until his death in 1660.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Dafydd ap Mathew was born in 1400, in Llandaff, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew, was 32 and his mother, Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming, was 35. He had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Gwenllian verch Dafydd. He died in 1484, in Neath, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 84, and was buried in St. Mary's, Briton Ferry, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

ko.St. Mary's, Llandaf, Glamorgan, Wales: 영국 웨일스 글램르건 브리턴 페리 스트. 마이'스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Dafydd ap Mathew(이)가 1400년 웨일스 글램르건 랜다프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Gwenllian verch Dafydd(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 니앳h에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건 브리턴 페리 스트. 마이'스에 묻혔다.

pt.St. Mary's, Llandaf, Glamorgan, Wales: St. Mary's, Briton Ferry, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Dafydd ap Mathew nasceu em 1400, em Llandaff, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Gwenllian verch Dafydd. Ele faleceu em 1484, em Neath, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em St. Mary's, Briton Ferry, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Mary's, Llandaf, Glamorgan, Wales: ст. мэри'с, бритон фирри, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Dafydd ap Mathew родился в 1400 г. в местности лландафф, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming, 35. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Gwenllian verch Dafydd. Он умер в 1484 г. в местности нит, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности ст. мэри'с, бритон фирри, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.St. Mary's, Llandaf, Glamorgan, Wales: St. Mary's, Briton Ferry, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Dafydd ap Mathew nació en 1400, en Llandaff, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Mathew ap Ieuan Mathew, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Janet Verch Jenkin Fleming, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Gwenllian verch Dafydd. Murió en 1484, en Neath, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en St. Mary's, Briton Ferry, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
